headline: Is It Time To Reconsider Clorox (CLX) After A Tough Year For The Stock Price
summary: This article examines whether Clorox now looks like a bargain or still appears expensive after a difficult stretch for the stock, and walks through what the current price might be implying. Clorox shares last closed at US$94.14. The stock is up 4.6% over the past week and 4.6% over the past month, but is still showing a decline of 6.7% year to date and a decline of 23.0% over the past year. These moves sit against a backdrop of ongoing interest in defensive consumer staples, with market...
